query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'userSubscriptions' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3JZ9fT9capQqaJ5.root --database 7Q8gdiHiBpSXUrkFz6JMfV --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'userSubscriptions' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	COLUMN_TYPE
id	int(11)
userId	int(11)
tierId	int(11)
startDate	timestamp
